title: Vinicius scores twice as Madrid win to keep Barcelona waiting for title
summary: Real Madrid's Vinicius Jr scored twice to secure a 2-0 victory over Espanyol, maintaining pressure in the La Liga title race ahead of next week's critical El Clásico against Barcelona. The win keeps Barcelona waiting to clinch the title and sets up a pivotal clash between the two rivals.
content: Vinicius Jr scores twice as Real Madrid beat Espanyol 2-0 to keep Barcelona waiting to win the La Liga title ahead of next week's El Clasico.

zh.title: 维尼修斯梅开二度，皇马胜利让巴塞罗那继续等待夺冠
zh.summary: 皇家马德里的维尼修斯梅开二度，以2-0击败埃斯帕尼奥尔，在西甲争冠中保持压力，为下周对阵巴塞罗那的关键国家德比做准备。这场胜利让巴塞罗那继续等待夺冠的机会，并为两支劲旅之间的关键对决奠定了基础。

title: Should Sesko goal have been ruled out?
summary: BBC Match of the Day pundits Alan Shearer and Micah Richards argue that Benjamin Sesko's goal against Liverpool should have been disallowed after the ball brushed his fingers, contending it violated handball rules under current laws of the game. The controversial incident raises questions about VAR decision-making in the Premier League.
content: Match of the Day pundits Alan Shearer and Micah Richards believe Benjamin Sesko's goal against Liverpool should not have stood after it brushed his fingers, saying under the laws of the game it should have been a handball.

zh.title: 塞斯科的进球应该被判无效吗？
zh.summary: BBC《今日比赛》评论员艾伦·希勒和米卡·理查兹认为，本杰明·塞斯科对阵利物浦的进球在球碰到他的手指后应该被判无效，声称违反了现行比赛规则中的手球规定。这个有争议的事件引发了人们对英超联赛视频助理裁判决定的质疑。

title: Carrick 'deserves chance' to continue at Man Utd - Shearer
summary: BBC pundit Alan Shearer believes Michael Carrick merits a permanent managerial role at Manchester United following the team's successful Champions League qualification. Carrick's ability to secure European football demonstrates his capability to lead the club.
content: Match of the Day pundit Alan Shearer says Michael Carrick "deserves a chance" as Manchester United's manager next season after securing a Champions League spot.

zh.title: 卡里克"值得机会"继续执掌曼联——希勒
zh.summary: BBC评论员艾伦·希勒认为迈克尔·卡里克因为球队成功获得欧冠资格，理应获得曼联永久主教练的职位。卡里克保证欧洲足球的能力证明了他领导俱乐部的能力。

title: How 'outstanding' Tottenham beat Villa
summary: Tottenham Hotspur delivered an impressive performance against Aston Villa, with Match of the Day analyst Micah Richards praising their "brave" pressing strategy during their Premier League victory. The tactical approach proved decisive in securing the win.
content: Match of the Day pundit Micah Richards analyses Tottenham Hotspur's "brave" press during their win against Aston Villa in the Premier League.

zh.title: 热刺如何"出色地"击败阿斯顿维拉
zh.summary: 热刺在对阿斯顿维拉的比赛中表现出色，赛事分析师米卡·理查兹称赞了他们在英超胜利中采取的"勇敢"的高位逼抢战术。这种战术方法对赢得比赛起到了决定性作用。

title: 'Exceptional' Mainoo is proving his worth - Richards
summary: Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo scored a crucial goal against Liverpool and earned praise from Micah Richards for an "exceptional" performance in the Premier League. Mainoo's contribution demonstrates his emerging importance to Manchester United's success.
content: Match of the Day pundit Micah Richards says Manchester United's Kobbie Mainoo is "exceptional" after scoring the winning goal in their match against Liverpool in the Premier League.

zh.title: "杰出的"曼努证明了自己的价值 - 理查兹
zh.summary: 曼联中场球员科比·曼努在对阵利物浦的比赛中打进了一粒关键球，并因英超中的"杰出"表现获得了米卡·理查兹的赞扬。曼努的表现表明了他对曼联成功日益增长的重要性。

title: A huge night for Spurs - but who are favourites to go down?
summary: Tottenham's 2-1 win at Aston Villa lifted them out of the Premier League relegation zone in a crucial match for their survival hopes. The victory reshuffles the relegation battle, leaving other teams facing increased pressure to escape the drop zone.
content: Tottenham's 2-1 win at Aston Villa moved them out of the Premier League relegation zone - but who are now the favourites to go down?

zh.title: 热刺的关键之夜 - 但谁是降级的热门人选？
zh.summary: 热刺在阿斯顿维拉以2-1的胜利将自己推出英超降级区，这是他们争取保级的关键比赛。这场胜利改变了降级形势，使其他球队面临更大的压力来逃脱降级区。

title: Has tide turned for troubled Spurs under De Zerbi?
summary: Tottenham Hotspur's impressive 2-1 victory at Aston Villa signals a potential turning point in their battle to avoid Premier League relegation under manager Roberto De Zerbi. Chief football writer Phil McNulty examines whether this win marks a genuine momentum shift for the struggling club.
content: Is Tottenham Hotspur's superb win at Aston Villa the moment the tide turned in  their fight against Premier League relegation, asks chief football writer Phil McNulty?

zh.title: 德泽尔比带领下的热刺能否扭转困境？
zh.summary: 托特纳姆热刺在阿斯顿维拉的2-1胜利标志着他们在主教练罗伯托·德泽尔比的带领下，在英超保级之战中取得潜在的转折点。资深足球评论员菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂分析了这场胜利是否为这支苦苦挣扎的球队带来真正的动力转变。

title: Juventus target Man City's Reijnders - Monday's gossip
summary: Juventus have identified Manchester City's Tijjani Reijnders as a transfer target, while Newcastle look to retain striker Will Osula and both Crystal Palace and Chelsea express interest in Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola. The transfer window heats up with multiple clubs pursuing key figures.
content: Juventus target Man City's Tijjani Reijnders, Newcastle hope to retain striker Will Osula, Crystal Palace and Chelsea eye Bournemouth boss Andoni Iraola, plus more.

zh.title: 尤文图斯瞄准曼城球员赖因德斯 - 周一转会风声
zh.summary: 尤文图斯已将曼城的蒂迦尼·赖因德斯列为转会目标，纽卡斯尔希望留住前锋威尔·奥苏拉，水晶宫和切尔西都表达了对伯恩茅斯主教练安东尼·伊拉奥拉的兴趣。随着多支俱乐部争夺关键人物，转会市场升温。

title: Emery defends Villa squad rotation after Spurs loss
summary: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery defended his team's squad rotation decisions following a 2-1 home defeat to Tottenham Hotspur, extending their losing streak to three consecutive games. The rotation strategy came under scrutiny after the disappointing result.
content: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery defends the rotation of his squad after his team lose a third consecutive game with a 2-1 home defeat against Tottenham.

zh.title: 埃梅里为阿斯顿维拉对热刺失利后的轮换决定进行辩护
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉主教练乌奈·埃梅里为球队在主场以2-1负于托特纳姆热刺后的轮换决定进行了辩护，这使球队的连败纪录达到三场。该轮换策略因这场失利而备受质疑。

title: Spurs 'cannot be happy' despite Villa win - De Zerbi
summary: Tottenham Hotspur manager Roberto De Zerbi cautioned that despite moving out of the relegation zone with a 2-1 victory at Aston Villa, his team cannot be satisfied with a single positive result. De Zerbi emphasized the need for sustained improvement to ensure survival.
content: Tottenham Hotspur boss Roberto De Zerbi says his players "cannot be happy yet" after they moved out of the relegation zone after beating Aston Villa 2-1 at Villa Park.

zh.title: 德泽比：热刺尽管战胜阿斯顿维拉但"不能满意"
zh.summary: 托特纳姆热刺主教练罗伯托·德泽比警告说，尽管他的球队以2-1的比分战胜阿斯顿维拉并逃离降级区，但不能只满足于一次积极的结果。德泽比强调了需要持续改进以确保球队保级。

title: Bournemouth up to sixth with win over poor Palace
summary: Bournemouth climbed to sixth place in the Premier League table with a dominant 3-0 victory over Crystal Palace at the Vitality Stadium. The convincing win strengthens their push for a European qualification spot next season.
content: Bournemouth move up to sixth place to boost their hopes of finishing in a European spot after beating Crystal Palace 3-0 at the Vitality Stadium.

zh.title: 伯恩茅斯战胜不佳的水晶宫升至第六位
zh.summary: 伯恩茅斯在维塔利蒂球场以压倒性的3-0战胜水晶宫，升至英超第六位。这场令人信服的胜利加强了他们争取下赛季欧洲赛事资格的努力。

title: Man Utd beat Liverpool to secure Champions League place
summary: Manchester United secured Champions League qualification for next season with a 3-2 victory over Liverpool in a thrilling Premier League encounter. The win secures European football for the club following their improved domestic performance.
content: Watch highlights as Manchester United secure their spot in the Champions League next season after a 3-2 win over Liverpool in the Premier League.

zh.title: 曼联战胜利物浦确保欧冠名额
zh.summary: 曼联在一场精彩的英超比赛中以3-2战胜利物浦，确保了下赛季的欧冠资格。这场胜利在球队国内表现改善后为俱乐部确保了欧洲足球。

title: Spurs out of relegation zone with Villa win
summary: Tottenham Hotspur escaped the Premier League relegation zone after a commanding 2-1 victory over Aston Villa at Villa Park. The win proved crucial in their battle for top-flight survival.
content: Tottenham Hotspur propel themselves out of the relegation zone with a commanding 2-1 win over Aston Villa in the Premier League.

zh.title: 热刺战胜维拉 成功逃离英超降级区
zh.summary: 热刺在客场以2:1击败阿斯顿维拉，成功逃离英超降级区。这场胜利对于热刺争取英超保级至关重要。

title: Hearts chase history as Rangers reach critical point
summary: Scottish Premiership leaders Heart of Midlothian prepare to face Rangers in a pivotal fixture, with Tom English previewing the "electrifying" encounter at Tynecastle. The match is critical for Rangers' title aspirations as Hearts pursue a historic season.
content: "Tynecastle will be an electrifying experience," writes Tom English, previewing Rangers' visit to Scottish Premiership pacesetters Heart of Midlothian.

zh.title: 米德洛锡安追逐历史 流浪者队陷入关键时刻
zh.summary: 苏超领先球队米德洛锡安将在泰恩卡斯尔主场迎战流浪者队。汤姆·英格利什预测这将是一场"令人兴奋的"对决。这场比赛对流浪者队的夺冠前景至关重要，同时米德洛锡安也在追逐历史性的赛季。

title: Carrick secures Champions League - what are Man Utd waiting for?
summary: Football correspondent Simon Stone argues that Manchester United should offer Michael Carrick the permanent manager position following his success securing Champions League qualification. Unless the club attracts Luis Enrique, Carrick appears to be the most suitable candidate for the role.
content: Unless Manchester United appoint Luis Enrique, it is hard to think of an acceptable alternative to giving Michael Carrick the job on a permanent basis, writes Simon Stone.

zh.title: 卡里克确保欧冠资格 曼联还在等什么？
zh.summary: 足球记者西蒙·斯通认为，曼联应该向迈克尔·卡里克提供永久主教练职位，因为他成功为球队确保了欧冠资格。除非曼联能引入路易斯·恩里克，否则卡里克似乎是该职位最合适的候选人。

title: Slot's VAR fury but loss highlights Liverpool issues
summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot disputed a VAR decision that allowed Manchester United's second goal in a 3-2 defeat, but also acknowledged deeper issues within his own team's performance. The loss exposed vulnerabilities that extend beyond controversial refereeing decisions.
content: Liverpool manager Arne Slot was furious that Manchester United's second goal was allowed, but also highlighted issues with his own side after the 3-2 defeat.

zh.title: 斯洛特对VAR决定愤怒，但失败暴露利物浦问题
zh.summary: 利物浦主教练阿恩·斯洛特对允许曼联第二球的VAR决定提出异议，球队以2:3不敌曼联，但他也承认自己球队表现中存在更深层的问题。这场失败暴露了超越有争议裁判决定之外的漏洞。

title: Watch: Highlights and analysis as Celtic beat Hibs
summary: BBC Sport presents extended highlights and analysis of Celtic's victory over Hibernian, narrated by Jonathan Sutherland. The coverage provides comprehensive coverage of the Scottish Premier League encounter.
content: Jonathan Sutherland presents extended highlights of Hibernian v Celtic.

zh.title: 观看：凯尔特人击败希布斯的精彩瞬间和分析
zh.summary: BBC体育频道呈现凯尔特人击败希布斯的扩展精彩瞬间和分析，由乔纳森·萨瑟兰讲述。报道提供了苏格兰超级联赛比赛的全面报道。

title: Sources: Unwell Ferguson leaves Utd-Liverpool
summary: Sir Alex Ferguson departed Old Trafford ahead of Manchester United's Premier League match against Liverpool on Sunday due to feeling unwell. His absence marks a notable moment in a significant fixture between the rivals.
content: Sir Alex Ferguson left Old Trafford ahead of Manchester United's Premier League clash with Liverpool on Sunday after feeling unwell, sources told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：身体不适的弗格森缺席曼联-利物浦比赛
zh.summary: 亚历克斯·弗格森爵士因身体不适,缺席了曼彻斯特联队周日与利物浦的英超比赛。他的缺席在这场劲旅之间的重大对阵中成为了一个值得注意的时刻。

title: Utd hold off Liverpool fightback to qualify for UC...
summary: Kobbie Mainoo scored the winning goal as Manchester United defeated Liverpool 3-2 in a thrilling encounter, securing Champions League qualification. The victory proved pivotal for United's return to Europe's premier club competition.
content: Homegrown Manchester United star Kobbie Mainoo sealed a helter-skelter 3-2 victory against archrivals Liverpool, earning them Champions League qualification.

zh.title: 曼联顶住利物浦反扑,成功晋级欧冠
zh.summary: 科比·马伊诺打进制胜球,曼彻斯特联队在一场激烈的比赛中以3:2击败利物浦,确保了欧冠资格。这场胜利对曼联重返欧洲顶级俱乐部赛事至关重要。

title: Slot says Liverpool showed 'pattern' of bad calls
summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot criticized what he characterized as a "complete pattern" of poor refereeing decisions against his team this season. A controversial handball incident that was not flagged during Manchester United's 3-2 victory heightened Slot's frustration with what he views as systematic bias in officiating.
content: Arne Slot said there is a "complete pattern" of decisions going against his Liverpool team this season after Manchester United inflicted a 3-2 defeat at OId Trafford with a handball on Benjamin Sesko's goal being overlooked by match officials.

zh.title: 斯洛特指责利物浦遭遇"系统性"坏判
zh.summary: 利物浦主教练阿尔内·斯洛特批评他所称的本赛季对其球队的"系统性"裁判不公。曼彻斯特联队3:2胜利中一个有争议的手球事件未被判罚,这加剧了斯洛特对系统性裁判偏见的不满。

title: Kerr becomes Chelsea's all-time top WSL scorer
summary: Sam Kerr became Chelsea's all-time leading goalscorer in the Women's Super League by netting her 64th goal in the division. The historic achievement came during Chelsea's match against Leicester City and underscores Kerr's elite status in women's football.
content: Sam Kerr has become Chelsea's all-time top goalscorer in the Women's Super League after scoring her 64th goal in the division against Leicester City.

zh.title: 克尔成为切尔西女超联赛历史进球最多射手
zh.summary: 萨姆·克尔凭借在女超联赛中打进的第64球，成为切尔西历史上进球最多的球员。这一历史性成就在切尔西对莱斯特城的比赛中达成，突显了克尔在女子足球中的精英地位。

title: Catch us if you can! Man City's dramatic late win ...
summary: Manchester City extended their Women's Super League title bid with a dramatic late victory over Liverpool that strengthens their championship position. The late winner puts City almost out of reach of nearest challengers Arsenal in the title race.
content: Manchester City got their WSL title bid back on course with a late, late win over Liverpool that puts them almost out of sight of challengers Arsenal.

zh.title: 追我们啊！曼城的戏剧性逆转胜...
zh.summary: 曼城通过对利物浦的戏剧性逆转胜利，延续了他们的女超联赛冠军争夺，加强了他们的冠军位置。这个逆转胜利让曼城在冠军争夺中几乎遥遥领先于最近的挑战者阿森纳。

title: Man United's thrilling win seals Champions League ...
summary: Kobbie Mainoo's winning goal secured Manchester United's Champions League qualification following their 3-2 victory over Liverpool. The result ensures United's return to European football's premier competition and leaves Liverpool facing pressure in the season's final weeks.
content: Kobbie Mainoo's winning goal secured Manchester United's return to the Champions League and left rivals Liverpool facing a nervy end to the season.

zh.title: 曼联激动人心的胜利锁定欧冠资格
zh.summary: 科比·梅努的制胜球为曼联在3-2战胜利物浦后确保了欧冠资格。这一结果确保了曼联重返欧洲足球顶级赛事，并使利物浦在赛季最后几周面临压力。

title: Ups, downs and the race for Europe
summary: A comprehensive guide covering the promotion, relegation, and European qualification battles across England's Premier League, Scotland's top league, and the Women's Super League. The overview provides essential context for the final stages of the season across these competitions.
content: All you need to know about promotion, relegation and qualification for Europe in England and Scotland's top men's football leagues, and the Women's Super League.

zh.title: 起伏和欧洲赛事的竞争
zh.summary: 一份全面指南，涵盖英超、苏格兰顶级联赛和女超联赛中的升级、降级和欧洲资格竞争。概述为这些赛事的最后阶段提供了基本背景。

title: Injuries not an excuse for loss at Man Utd - Slot
summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot rejected injuries as an excuse for the 3-2 defeat at Manchester United despite his team missing Mohamed Salah, Alisson, and Alexander Isak. Slot expressed confidence his squad possessed the quality to compete, though the loss highlighted their struggles without key players.
content: Liverpool boss Arne Slot believes his side had the quality to compete with Manchester United, depite the absence of Mohamed Salah, Alisson and Alexander Isak in their 3-2 loss at Old Trafford.

zh.title: 伤病不是曼联失利的借口 - 斯洛特
zh.summary: 利物浦主教练阿尔内·斯洛特拒绝以伤病作为球队在曼联3:2失利的借口,尽管他的球队缺少穆罕默德·萨拉赫、阿利松和亚历山大·伊萨克。斯洛特表示他的球队拥有竞争所需的实力,虽然失利突显了他们在缺少关键球员情况下的困难。

title: Champions League football 'a real achievement' - Carrick
summary: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick celebrated Champions League qualification by calling it "a real achievement" after the team's 3-2 victory over Liverpool. The qualification was secured with multiple matches remaining, underlining United's resurgence under Carrick's management.
content: Manchester United boss Michael Carrick says securing a place in the Champions League with so many games to spare is "a real achievement" after his team beat Liverpool 3-2 in the Premier League.

zh.title: 欧冠足球是"真正的成就" - 卡里克
zh.summary: 曼联主教练迈克尔·卡里克在球队以3:2战胜利物浦后,将欧冠资格称为"真正的成就"来庆祝。在还有多场比赛剩余的情况下已经确保资格,突显了曼联在卡里克管理下的复兴。

title: Barcelona beat Bayern to reach Women's Champions League final
summary: Barcelona advanced to the Women's Champions League final by defeating Bayern Munich 5-3 on aggregate, winning the second leg 4-2 at the Nou Camp. The Spanish club will face Lyon in the final, setting up a match between European women's football elite.
content: Barcelona beat Bayern Munich 4-2 at the Nou Camp to win their semi-final tie 5-3 on aggregate to advance to the Women's Champions League final where they will face Lyon.

zh.title: 巴塞罗那战胜拜仁进入女足欧冠决赛
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那以总比分5:3战胜拜仁慕尼黑进入女足欧冠决赛,在诺坎普球场第二回合以4:2获胜。这支西班牙球队将在决赛中面对里昂,这将是欧洲女足精英之间的对阵。

title: Who has qualified for next season's Champions League?
summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team detailed which teams have already secured Champions League qualification for the 2026-27 season. The analysis clarifies the current landscape of European football's top competition as the season's run-in unfolds.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains which teams have already qualified for the 2026-27 edition of the Champions League.

zh.title: 谁已获得下赛季欧冠资格?
zh.summary: BBC体育栏目的"问我任何问题"团队详细介绍了哪些球队已经确保了2026-27赛季欧洲冠军联赛的资格。随着赛季进入冲刺阶段，该分析阐明了欧洲足球顶级赛事的当前形势。

title: Manchester City snatch late win over Liverpool to extend WSL title lead
summary: Manchester City extended their Women's Super League title lead with a late goal from Rebecca Knaak against Liverpool. The dramatic finish demonstrated City's ability to deliver under pressure in a competitive title race.
content: Watch highlights as Manchester City's Rebecca Knaak scores a late winner against Liverpool to extend their title lead in the Women's Super League.

zh.title: 曼城末分钟战胜利物浦 扩大英超女足联赛领先优势
zh.summary: 曼城通过丽贝卡·克纳克的进球战胜利物浦，扩大了英超女足联赛的领先优势。这场戏剧性的结局展示了曼城在竞争激烈的冠军争夺中在压力下的表现能力。

title: Spurs set points record with victory over London City
summary: Tottenham established a new points record in the Women's Super League with a 2-1 victory over London City Lionesses. Goals from Signe Gaupset and Olivia Holdt secured fifth place and the club's best-ever league points total in WSL history.
content: Tottenham beat London City Lionesses 2-1 with goals from Signe Gaupset and Olivia Holdt to secure a fifth place finish and record their highest points total in the WSL.

zh.title: 热刺以胜利创造英超女足联赛积分纪录
zh.summary: 热刺以2-1战胜伦敦城狮队，创造了英超女足联赛的新积分纪录。西格妮·高普塞特和奥利维亚·霍尔特的进球帮助球队确保第五名，创造了俱乐部英超女足联赛历史最高积分。

title: Relief for Celtic... now does O'Neill want Rangers to win?
summary: Celtic drew level with Hearts at the top of the Scottish Premiership after defeating 10-man Hibernian under interim manager Martin O'Neill. O'Neill acknowledged minimal room for error in the title race despite the positive result as the battle intensifies.
content: Celtic interim manager Martin O'Neill recognises there is still "little margin for error" after his side beat 10-man Hibernian to draw level with Hearts at the top of the Scottish Premiership.

zh.title: 凯尔特人的宽慰...奥尼尔现在想让流浪者队赢吗?
zh.summary: 凯尔特人在临时主教练马丁·奥尼尔的带领下击败10人的希伯尼安队后,与心脏病队并列苏格兰超级联赛第一。尽管取得了积极的成果,奥尼尔承认在争夺冠军的比赛中犯不得错误,因为争夺愈加激烈。

title: The battle for sixth... and why teams might need to lose on final day
summary: BBC Sport analyzed the Premier League's race for sixth place and Champions League qualification, revealing unusual circumstances that could influence final standings. The analysis highlighted scenarios where losing on the final day could be strategically beneficial for some clubs.
content: As the Premier League's battle for European places hots up, BBC Sport assesses the situation - and some very strange potential quirks in the race.

zh.title: 第六名的争夺...球队为什么可能需要在最后一天输球
zh.summary: 英国广播公司体育部分析了英超联赛第六名争夺和欧冠资格的竞争,揭示了可能影响最终排名的异常情况。该分析强调了一些球队在最后一天输球可能对战略有利的情况。

title: Chelsea beat Leicester City to secure Champions League place - highlights
summary: Chelsea secured Women's Champions League qualification by defeating Leicester City 3-1 in the Women's Super League. The convincing victory confirms Chelsea's participation in Europe's premier women's club competition and solidifies their status among England's elite.
content: Watch highlights as Chelsea secure a spot in the Women's Champions League after beating Leicester City 3-1 in the Women's Super League.

zh.title: 切尔西击败莱斯特城获得欧冠席位 - 精彩时刻
zh.summary: 切尔西在女子超级联赛中以3-1击败莱斯特城,获得女子欧冠资格。这次令人信服的胜利确认了切尔西参加欧洲顶级女子俱乐部赛事的资格,并巩固了他们在英格兰精英球队中的地位。

title: Palace 'tank was empty' after Europa win on Thursday - Glasner
summary: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner attributed his team's 3-0 loss to Bournemouth to fatigue following a Europa League victory against Shakhtar Donetsk earlier in the week. The demanding fixture schedule left Palace depleted for their Premier League encounter.
content: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner says his team's tank was empty after their Europa League win against Shakhtar Donetsk on Thursday, after losing 0-3 to Bournemouth in the Premier League.

zh.title: 晶宫主帅格拉斯纳：欧罗巴胜利后"精疲力尽"
zh.summary: 水晶宫主教练奥利弗·格拉斯纳将球队0:3不敌伯恩茅斯归咎于周中欧罗巴杯击败沙赫塔尔顿涅茨克后的疲劳。紧凑的赛程使晶宫队在英超联赛中体力不支。

title: Bournemouth enjoying pressure of push for Europe - Iraola
summary: Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola expressed confidence that his team thrives under the pressure of competing for European qualification after moving into sixth place with a commanding 3-0 victory over Crystal Palace. The result showcased Bournemouth's credentials as genuine contenders for European football.
content: Bournemouth boss Andoni Iraola says his side is enjoying the pressure of competing for a place in Europe as his side moved into sixth place after beating Crystal Palace 3-0 at the Vitality Stadium.

zh.title: 伯恩茅斯主帅伊拉奥拉：享受欧战竞争的压力
zh.summary: 伯恩茅斯主教练安东尼·伊拉奥拉表示，球队在争夺欧战资格的压力下表现出色，现已升至积分榜第六位，以3:0大胜水晶宫。这场胜利证明伯恩茅斯是欧战争夺的真正竞争者。

title: Howe set to stay in charge of Newcastle after summit
summary: Newcastle head coach Eddie Howe appears set to continue in his role next season following meetings with the club's Saudi Arabian ownership. The talks suggest the club remains committed to Howe's long-term vision.
content: Head coach Eddie Howe looks set to lead Newcastle into next season after talks with the club's Saudi Arabian leadership.

zh.title: 霍伊峰会后将留任纽卡斯尔主帅
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔主教练埃迪·霍伊与俱乐部沙特阿拉伯老板会面后，似乎将继续担任球队主帅一职。此次会谈表明俱乐部致力于支持霍伊的长期愿景。

title: Ferguson taken to hospital as precaution before Man Utd v Liverpool
summary: Sir Alex Ferguson was hospitalized as a precaution after becoming unwell at Old Trafford prior to Manchester United's Premier League match against Liverpool. The legendary former manager received medical attention immediately following the incident.
content: Sir Alex Ferguson is taken to hospital after falling unwell at Old Trafford shortly before Manchester United's Premier League match with Liverpool on Sunday.

zh.title: 弗格森在曼联对利物浦前因谨慎起见被送入医院
zh.summary: 前曼联传奇主教练亚历克斯·弗格森在老特拉福德球场感到身体不适，作为谨慎起见被送入医院，当时曼联正准备与利物浦进行英超比赛。这位传奇前主帅在事件发生后立即得到了医疗照顾。

title: Holders Rangers beat Montrose to set up Old Firm cup final
summary: Defending champions Rangers reached their fourth consecutive Women's Scottish Cup final with a 2-0 victory over Montrose, setting up a showdown with rivals Celtic. The dominant performance secured Rangers' place in the showpiece match at Hampden.
content: Holders Rangers make it to their fourth consecutive Women's Scottish Cup final - where they will face rivals Celtic - after a 2-0 victory over brave Montrose at Hampden.

zh.title: 卫冕冠军流浪者队击败蒙特罗斯晋级老字号杯赛决赛
zh.summary: 卫冕冠军流浪者队以2-0战胜蒙特罗斯，连续第四次闯入女子苏格兰杯决赛，将与劲敌凯尔特人队争夺冠军。这场压倒性的胜利确保了流浪者队在汉普顿公园球场的决赛席位。

title: 'Weak' Orient players wasted year of career - Wellens
summary: Leyton Orient manager Richie Wellens criticizes his players for underperforming this season, accusing them of wasting a year of his managerial career. The harsh assessment reflects frustration with a disappointing campaign that failed to meet expectations.
content: Leyton Orient boss Richie Wellens issues a scathing attack on his own players, accusing them of wasting a year of his managerial career.

zh.title: "虚弱"的东方队球员浪费了职业生涯的一年 - 韦伦斯

title: Watford sack boss Still after less than three months
summary: Watford has terminated head coach Ed Still after fewer than three months in the role. The decision follows the team's failure to secure a playoff berth this season.
content: Watford sack head coach Ed Still after less than three months in charge at Vicarage Road following the team's failure to reach the play-offs.

title: Forget Spurs... relegated Barrow are kings of chaos
summary: Barrow has been relegated from League Two after cycling through five managers in a single season. The chaotic campaign earned them the nickname 'Kings of chaos' despite their fighting spirit.
content: After five managers during the season, 'Kings of chaos' Barrow have been relegated from League Two.

title: Aberdeen ready to move for Hibs' Boyle - gossip

title: What would it cost England and Scotland fans to go to World Cup?
summary: Fans planning to attend the World Cup from England and Scotland face substantial costs from inflated ticket prices, accommodation, and transport fares. This highlights the financial barriers that may limit attendance for the upcoming tournament.
content: High ticket prices, expensive accommodation and train fares way above normal rates. If you want to book a World Cup trip now, this is what it would cost.

title: Was season a missed opportunity for Wrexham?
summary: Wrexham finished seventh in the Championship, prompting questions about whether they underperformed this season. The analysis examines if the club should view this as a disappointment given their competitive ambitions.
content: After finishing seventh in the Championship, BBC Sport looks at whether or not Wrexham will see the 2025-26 season as a missed opportunity.

title: McKennie keeps having to fight to keep his spot wi...

title: Messi, Miami give up 3-goal lead in loss to Orland...
summary: Inter Miami squandered a three-goal lead to lose 4-3 to Orlando City, remaining without a win at their new home stadium. The collapse highlights the team's struggles establishing themselves at their new venue despite Messi's presence.
content: Orlando City rallied from three goals down to beat Inter Miami 4-3 on Saturday as Lionel Messi's side remained winless at its new stadium.

title: Arsenal looked superb with Saka back. Could it be ...
summary: Bukayo Saka returned from injury to lead Arsenal to a 3-0 victory over Fulham, showcasing the form that could propel them toward a Premier League title.
content: Bukayo Saka's first start in over a month was a welcome sight and he responded in kind, leading Arsenal to a 3-0 win over Fulham with an energy that could yet help them win the Premier League this season.

title: Arteta: In-form Saka gives Arsenal title momentum
summary: Manager Mikel Arteta said Saka's return to peak form provides crucial momentum for Arsenal's pursuit of domestic and European glory.
content: Mikel Arteta said Bukayo Saka has returned to his best form at a crucial moment and claimed momentum is with Arsenal as they target glory at home and abroad.

title: Reynolds 'gutted' as Wrexham's PL dreams dashed
summary: Wrexham co-owner Ryan Reynolds expressed his disappointment after the club failed to secure promotion to the Premier League this season.
content: Wrexham co-owner Ryan Reynolds has said that he is "completely gutted" after Wrexham's dream of reaching the Premier League came to an end, for this season anyway, on Saturday.

title: Flick picks magician over Madrid with title in sig...
summary: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick will prioritize performance as his team awaits confirmation of a potential LaLiga title this weekend.
content: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick will swap Real Madrid for a magician on Sunday as he waits to find out if his team will be crowned LaLiga champions this weekend.

title: Villas-Boas tops Mourinho as Porto clinch title
summary: FC Porto, led by president Andre Villas-Boas, won the Portuguese Primeira Liga title by defeating Benfica, coached by Jose Mourinho, in a matchup between mentor and protégé.
content: The protégé got the better of his old mentor in Portugal as FC Porto, under the presidency of Andre Villas-Boas, beat Jose Mourinho-coached Benfica to the Portuguese Primeira Liga title on Saturday.

zh.title: 维拉斯-博阿斯击败穆里尼奥，波尔图赢得冠军
zh.summary: 由主席安德雷·维拉斯-博阿斯领导的波尔图足球俱乐部通过击败由何塞·穆里尼奥执教的本菲卡赢得葡萄牙超级联赛冠军，这是师徒之间的对决。

title: Dest returns from injury to boost U.S. WC hopes
summary: U.S. defender Sergiño Dest returned from hamstring injury as a substitute in PSV's draw with Ajax, providing a boost to American World Cup aspirations.
content: United States defender Sergiño Dest made his return from a hamstring injury by coming on as a substitute in PSV Eindhoven's 2-2 draw at Ajax in the Dutch league on Saturday.

zh.title: 德斯特伤愈复出 提振美国世界杯前景

title: Dzeko, 40, leads Schalke to Bundesliga promotion
summary: At age 40, striker Edin Dzeko helped lead Schalke back to the Bundesliga with a decisive victory, securing the seven-time champion's return to Germany's top tier.
content: Edin Dzeko returned in time for the celebrations as seven-time German champion Schalke sealed their return to the Bundesliga with a 1-0 win over Fortuna Düsseldorf on Saturday.

zh.title: 40岁的哲科领导沙尔克升入德甲
zh.summary: 40岁的前锋埃丁·哲科帮助沙尔克凭借决定性胜利重返德甲，这支七次德甲冠军队重返德国顶级联赛。
